name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new idea or feature for our projects

---

### 💡 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of what the problem or limitation is.

### 🚀 Describe the solution you'd like
A clear description of what you want to happen and how it should work.

### 🎯 Describe alternatives you've considered
A clear description of any alternative solutions or features you've thought of.
